data.title: 𝐁𝐢𝐠 𝐖𝐢𝐧𝐬 𝐟𝐨𝐫 𝐃𝐈𝐂𝐓 𝐑𝐞𝐠𝐢𝐨𝐧 𝐗! 🏆✨
data.description:
We’re coming home from the Festival of Innovation Awards 2026 with hearts full of gratitude! #YourDICTRegionX received a Special Mention for Digital Agency of the Year, specifically for our work bringing the Smart Village to life in Dalingap, Clarin.
Seeing a community gain access to eGovernment services and new digital livelihoods is the real "award" for us! 
A huge shoutout to our very own Kenneth T. Asuncion (Provincial Officer, Misamis Occidental) for being a finalist for the Rising Digital Star Award. From ChildSafe Thursdays to grassroots ICT projects, your dedication is inspiring! 
Awards are just the cherry on top. Our commitment to Northern Mindanao stays the same: We build, we connect, and we make sure no one is left behind. 
#DICTRegionX #SmartVillage #ICT4D #MisamisOccidental #GoodVibesLang

data.title: 𝐎𝐅𝐅𝐈𝐂𝐈𝐀𝐋𝐋𝐘 𝐀𝐌𝐀𝐙𝐈𝐍𝐆: 𝐀 𝐖𝐎𝐑𝐋𝐃 𝐑𝐄𝐂𝐎𝐑𝐃 𝐏𝐎𝐖𝐄𝐑𝐄𝐃 𝐁𝐘 𝐓𝐄𝐂𝐇 + 𝐂𝐎𝐌𝐌𝐔𝐍𝐈𝐓𝐘
data.description:
2,305 bamboo planters. Multiple venues. One Guinness World Record.

On October 18, 2024, the Philippines etched its name into the Guinness World Records for the most people planting bamboo simultaneously—a climate action milestone that showed what we can achieve when government, tech communities, and local responders work hand in hand.

DICT Region 10 was proud to play a strategic and enabling role in this historic feat—
 Mobilizing digital infrastructure and on-ground presence
 Supporting coordination and site readiness through our provincial teams
 Activating the Digital Transformation Center (DTC) – Maramag as the central command HQ
 Facilitating connectivity and system support to ensure successful validation and reporting

Our mandate to empower digitally transformed communities was embodied through this initiative—where technology became a tool for sustainability and volunteerism.

And powering this mission on the ground was none other than DEVCON Bukidnon.

As our innovation partner, they led the development and deployment of an automated counting system that ensured accuracy, compliance, and real-time data monitoring—essential components that secured Guinness validation. Their tech-driven coordination helped bring structure and visibility to a multi-site operation that spanned far and wide across the country.

This isn’t just about breaking records—it’s about building ecosystems where technology meets purpose, and volunteers become nation-builders.
Let’s keep growing—digitally and sustainably. 

#DICTRegion10 #DICT #DigitalBayanihan #BagongPilipinas #GoodVibesLang #GuinnessWorldRecord #DEVCONBukidnon #BukidnonInnovation

data.title: 𝗪𝗲 𝗷𝘂𝘀𝘁 𝗺𝗮𝗱𝗲 𝗵𝗶𝘀𝘁𝗼𝗿𝘆, 𝗡𝗼𝗿𝘁𝗵𝗲𝗿𝗻 𝗠𝗶𝗻𝗱𝗮𝗻𝗮𝗼! 👏😃📣
data.description:
DICT Region 10 is proud to announce that we have been recognized as a winner of the 2024 World Summit on the Information Society (WSIS) Prizes for our project, “Digital Literacy Caravan for Public Schools.” This prestigious award acknowledges our efforts in promoting digital literacy and bridging the digital divide in Northern Mindanao.

The Digital Literacy Caravan has reached over 2,400 students across 10 remote public high schools, providing hands-on coding and internet safety seminars. This initiative has empowered students with essential digital skills, preparing them for the challenges of the modern world.

We extend our heartfelt gratitude to our dedicated team, partners, and the communities we serve. This achievement is a testament to our commitment to fostering a digitally inclusive society.

#DICTRegion10 #WSISPrize #DigitalLiteracy #EmpoweringCommunities #NorthernMindanao
